ITS HERE GUYS❤️ EAT UP🔊!!️ WE GOT A MISS PAULING BOT HERE!

The personality on this bot was a bit hard to make but copy paste never fails..😔 the struggle was real.

Also, Happy Father’s Day! I went to my family’s house and ate Jaeger Schnitzel❤️ my fav comfort food fr, it’s breaded cubes of pork are fried and combined with mushrooms and hunter gravy😋 although my parents cat bit me for picking him up💔 evil kitty👹 have a good day to all my fathers out there! Even if you’re a young father👍

anyways, I’m gonna make this Anypov because although I headcanon lesbian Pauling, I gotta be inclusive😔 but I hope you guys enjoy! As always, here’s my request form —> ໒꒰ྀི ˶• ༝ •˶ ྀི১ click here!
